mapper.sql: select id, user_id, merchant_id, holder_name, first_name, last_name, mobile, email, id_card, address, post_code, country, status, upstream_holder_id, remark, deleted_flag, created_at, updated_at from vcc_card_holder
mapper.insert: insert into vcc_card_holder ( user_id, merchant_id, holder_name, first_name, last_name, mobile, email, id_card, address, post_code, country, status, upstream_holder_id, remark, deleted_flag, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{userId}, #{merchantId}, #{holderName}, #{firstName}, #{lastName}, #{mobile}, #{email}, #{idCard}, #{address}, #{postCode}, #{country}, #{status}, #{upstreamHolderId}, #{remark}, #{deletedFlag}, sysdate(), sysdate() )
mapper.update:
update vcc_card_holder
holder_name = #{holderName}, first_name = #{firstName}, last_name = #{lastName}, mobile = #{mobile}, email = #{email}, id_card = #{idCard}, address = #{address}, post_code = #{postCode}, country = #{country}, status = #{status}, upstream_holder_id = #{upstreamHolderId}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = sysdate()
where id = #{id} and merchant_id = #{merchantId} and deleted_flag = '0'
